package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirst() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_over_map_for_deterministic_first"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Collection iteration. Flag map iteration used to pick a deterministic first value, causing unstable work and extra sorting later."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
